ground_truth.title: Queen Creek, AZ Pest Control & Termite Control Specialists
ground_truth.main_content:
Queen Creek, AZ Pest Control Services 
If you’re looking for protection from ants, spiders, termites, or other pests, Termio Pest Control is here to help! When it comes to the best pest control in Queen Creek and the Phoenix area, we’re your go-to for quality service.

Why Choose Termio Pest Control In Queen Creek, AZ?
Your home deserves the best protection from pests, and Termio Pest Control is here to deliver just that. With a reputation for reliability and results, Termio goes above and beyond to ensure your home stays pest-free. Here's why we are the trusted choice for Queen Creek homeowners:

Locally Owned & Family Operated: As a family-owned and operated pest control company, we are the local experts you can count on to eliminate insect and rodent infestations.
Eco-Friendly Pest Control: Tough on pests but not the environment, Termio's pest and termite control services keep homes pest-free using eco-conscious products and services.
Guaranteed Results: Your protection is our top priority. Backed by our satisfaction guarantee, we deliver peace of mind with every service.

We’re In Your Neighborhood
Contact A Termio Pest Control Office Near You!
The pest professionals at the Termio are passionate about helping property owners resolve pest problems, no matter how tough! To find out how we can help you, select a service below, or give us a call to schedule a free inspection.

Termio Pest Control
At Termio Pest Control, we are a full-service pest control company passionate about helping property owners live pest-free.

Say Goodbye To Household Pests
Home Pest Control Services In Queen Creek
Termio Pest Control offers family-friendly home pest control services in Queen Creek that eliminate and prevent insects and rodents from becoming nuisances or, worse, from causing damage. Termio Essentials, our year-round plan, keeps house-infesting pests out so you can focus on what matters—taking care of your family! Follow the link below to check out our residential plan and pricing, or give us a call to learn more.
Starting at: $49/mo*

"Aaron is very professional and personable. He works quickly and precisely. He knows a lot about the habits and lifecycles of pests. Gave us good advice."
L. Babbitt
Phoenix, AZ

Exterminate Termites Before They Damage Your Home
Expert Termite Control In Queen Creek, AZ
Unfortunately, termites are a serious threat to homes in Queen Creek and throughout the Phoenix area. They can cause significant damage to homes without proper termite protection in place, leaving owners with costly repair bills. At Termio Pest Control, we offer effective termite control in Queen Creek that keeps these wood-destroying insects away!

"Messiah was very knowledgeable about our neighborhood and the risks associated with a recent uptick in termites. He spent time answering all of my questions. Wonderful experience; I feel like we're in good hands."
Christine B.
Gilbert, AZ

Scorpion Control In Queen Creek, AZ
Scorpions are more than just a nuisance - they can pose real risks to people and pets. At Termio Pest Control, we specialize in scorpion control that provides long-lasting relief for Queen Creek homeowners. Our local pest control pros know where scorpions hide and how they behave, which allows us to eliminate them effectively.
Don't let scorpions invade your home - contact us today for expert scorpion control solutions!

Rodent Control In Queen Creek, AZ
When rodents infest they can cause significant property damage and introduce serious health risks. At Termio Pest Control, we take a thorough approach to rodent control, ensuring your home is protected from mice and rats. Our services include inspecting for signs of rodent activity and implementing effective treatments to eliminate existing infestations. We also focus on long-term prevention to keep rodents out for good. With the best rodent control in Queen Creek, Termio provides the expertise you need for a rodent-free home. Contact us today to safeguard your home from these unwelcome guests!

Ant Control In Queen Creek, Arizona
Ants may be small, but they can become a big problem for homeowners. At Termio Pest Control, we offer proven ant control in Queen Creek that not only exterminates ant foraging on your property, but also identifies and addresses the root of the issue. Our highly trained and fully licensed pest control specialists will identify the ant species and use targeted pest treatments to eliminate the entire colony.
If you're searching for a local pest control company that makes ant control simple and stress-free, we are the one to call!

Effective Spider Treatments In Queen Creek, AZ
Spiders in your home can be unsettling, especially when dealing with venomous species like black widows and brown recluses. Of course, common house spiders aren't great, either. Termio Pest Control provides effective spider control services that target these pests and the bugs they feed on. When you contact us for assistance, we'll inspect your home and then deliver effective treatments that target spiders and eliminate unsightly spider webs.
Don't let spiders take over - contact us today for professional spider control in Queen Creek!

What Termio Customers Are Saying
"Aaron is a very thorough person and takes pride in his work. He listens to your concerns and addresses them, then follows up with you to let you know what action(s) was taken. I highly recommend Termio Pest Control as this company has been servicing my home for at least 3 to 4 years, and does a great job every time."
Ed O.
Queen Creek, AZ

"Termio and Messiah B. in particular have always provided us with excellent service. He is always professional and easy to work with. He is very knowledgeable about AZ termites and can put it into words people can understand. 
Susan S.
Queen Creek, AZ

"We've had Termio service since we moved into our current home and they treated this house for the previous owners, too. Never had issues with bugs or insects in the house at all. Service is always on time. Patty makes sure every time to thoroughly treat all areas around the house. Easy decision to stay with this service. Thanks."
Robert C.
Queen Creek, AZ

Subterranean termites don’t slow down in Phoenix’s mild winters. Mud tubes, blistering wood, or peeling paint may signal a hidden infestation.

Why Termite Activity Doesn’t Stop in Fall
November 13, 2025
Termites stay active in the fall. Here's how you can protect your Phoenix home from these pests.
